original: bothrioc pidemme
the
The
The bothrioc’s armor deflects your attack with alarming ease.
into your crotch
through your [pc.lowerGarments]
stroking against your [pc.cock]
and
sliding between the lips of your [pc.vagina]
Parrying the attack isn’t easy, but you knock the rapier off course, causing its seeking tip to soar off in a wide angle.

Thankfully most of the force behind the attack went into closing the distance, but rapiers are no joke even with seemingly little force behind them. While your shield is able to deflect the blow, it takes quite the toll on it.
Thankfully most of the force behind the attack went into closing the distance, but being stabbed by a rapier is no joke. Your wound grinds and stings as you move.
You dive to one side, and the shot whines off a rock behind you.
The shot spangs off of your shields.
You wince as the crude weapon finds its mark.
You dart out of the way, the furiously spinning weights careening past your [pc.legs] by a fraction.

The whirling trap hits you right in the middle, heavy ropes wrapping themselves around your limbs and weights thumping into you with hard momentum. You try and tear yourself loose of the tangle, but before you can the bothrioc pounces on you, pinning you to the ground under them. “Now then, precious,” they whisper, caressing your face. “Let’s have no more silly struggling, hmm?”
You can’t help but let your guard down a little, daydream at the possibilities... before you know what’s happened the bothrioc has effortlessly slipped beyond your arms.
The bothrioc leans into you, one hand caressing your [pc.chest] while another cops a feel of your [pc.ass] as they whisper into your ear
“You’re not quite the broodmare you should be, but our eggs will take care of that quite nicely, offworlder. Look forward to it.”
{var1}({var0})
You shiver, between the touches and words sliding into your ear, and shove the creature away.
